name: Conga Cat
short_description: Experience an adrenaline-fueled 2D platformer where you'll navigate tough challenges with jumps, climbs, and dashes at a thrilling pace.
detailed_description:
Join Conga Cat on a pulse-pounding quest to reclaim his missing drum kit in an adrenaline-fueled, lightning-fast action platformer.

  • Embark on an adventure filled with an array of diverse platforming challenges across a vibrant world.
  • Tough sets of collectibles in each level, inviting players to test their abilities.
  • Accessible controls with complex maneuvers, crafted to intrigue and challenge advanced players and speed-runners.
